mapper.select:
SELECT cdtf.id AS source_field_id, cdtf.field_type AS source_field_type, cdtf.NAME AS source_field_name, vlji.id, vlji.link_jump_id, vlji.link_type, vlji.jump_type, vlji.window_size, vlji.target_dv_id, dvi.type as target_dv_type, vlji.content,
core_share_link.uuid AS publicJumpId,
COALESCE( vlji.checked, 0 ) AS checked, COALESCE( vlji.attach_params, 0 ) AS attach_params, vljtvi.target_id, vljtvi.target_view_id, vljtvi.target_field_id, vljtvi.target_type, vljtvi.source_field_active_id, vopi.param_name as outer_params_name FROM core_chart_view_snapshot ccv LEFT JOIN core_dataset_field cdtf ON ccv.table_id = cdtf.dataset_group_id LEFT JOIN core_visualization_jump_snapshot vlj ON ccv.id = vlj.source_view_id AND vlj.id = #{id} LEFT JOIN core_visualization_jump_action_snapshot vlji ON vlj.id = vlji.link_jump_id AND cdtf.id = vlji.source_field_id LEFT JOIN core_visualization dvi ON vlji.target_dv_id = dvi.id LEFT JOIN core_visualization_jump_target_snapshot vljtvi ON vlji.id = vljtvi.link_jump_info_id
LEFT JOIN core_share_link ON core_share_link.creator = #{uid} AND vlji.target_dv_id = core_share_link.resource_id
left join core_visualization_parameter_item_snapshot vopi on vopi.params_info_id = vljtvi.target_view_id WHERE ccv.id = #{source_view_id} AND ccv.type != 'VQuery'
ORDER BY
cdtf.name
CONVERT ( cdtf.NAME USING gbk)
ORDER BY cdtf.name;

SELECT cdtf.id AS source_field_id, cdtf.field_type AS source_field_type, cdtf.NAME AS source_field_name, vlji.id, vlji.link_jump_id, vlji.link_type, vlji.jump_type, vlji.window_size, vlji.target_dv_id, dvi.type as target_dv_type, vlji.content,
core_share_link.uuid AS publicJumpId,
COALESCE( vlji.checked, 0 ) AS checked, COALESCE( vlji.attach_params, 0 ) AS attach_params, vljtvi.target_id, vljtvi.target_view_id, vljtvi.target_field_id, vljtvi.target_type, vljtvi.source_field_active_id, vopi.param_name as outer_params_name FROM core_chart_view ccv LEFT JOIN core_dataset_field cdtf ON ccv.table_id = cdtf.dataset_group_id LEFT JOIN core_visualization_jump vlj ON ccv.id = vlj.source_view_id AND vlj.id = #{id} LEFT JOIN core_visualization_jump_action vlji ON vlj.id = vlji.link_jump_id AND cdtf.id = vlji.source_field_id LEFT JOIN core_visualization dvi ON vlji.target_dv_id = dvi.id LEFT JOIN core_visualization_jump_target vljtvi ON vlji.id = vljtvi.link_jump_info_id
LEFT JOIN core_share_link ON core_share_link.creator = #{uid} AND vlji.target_dv_id = core_share_link.resource_id
left join core_visualization_parameter_item vopi on vopi.params_info_id = vljtvi.target_view_id WHERE ccv.id = #{source_view_id} AND ccv.type != 'VQuery'
ORDER BY
cdtf.name
CONVERT ( cdtf.NAME USING gbk)
ORDER BY cdtf.name;

SELECT ccv.id AS source_view_id, #{uid} as queryUid, #{isDesktop} as isDesktop, vlj.id, #{dvId} as source_dv_id, vlj.link_jump_info, COALESCE(ccv.jump_active, 0) AS checked FROM core_chart_view ccv LEFT JOIN core_visualization_jump vlj ON ccv.id = vlj.source_view_id WHERE vlj.source_dv_id = #{dvId} and ccv.jump_active = 1

SELECT ccv.id AS source_view_id, #{uid} as queryUid, #{isDesktop} as isDesktop, vlj.id, #{dvId} as source_dv_id, vlj.link_jump_info, COALESCE(ccv.jump_active, 0) AS checked FROM core_chart_view_snapshot ccv LEFT JOIN core_visualization_jump_snapshot vlj ON ccv.id = vlj.source_view_id WHERE vlj.source_dv_id = #{dvId} and ccv.jump_active = 1

SELECT core_chart_view.id, core_chart_view.title, core_chart_view.type, core_chart_view.scene_id AS dv_id, core_dataset_field.id AS field_id, core_dataset_field.origin_name, core_dataset_field.name AS field_name, core_dataset_field.type AS raw_field_type, core_dataset_field.field_type AS field_type FROM core_chart_view LEFT JOIN core_dataset_field ON core_chart_view.table_id = core_dataset_field.dataset_group_id INNER JOIN core_visualization dvi ON core_chart_view.scene_id = dvi.id WHERE core_chart_view.scene_id = #{dvId} AND core_chart_view.type != 'VQuery' AND core_chart_view.table_id IS NOT NULL AND dvi.id = #{dvId}

SELECT core_chart_view_snapshot.id, core_chart_view_snapshot.title, core_chart_view_snapshot.type, core_chart_view_snapshot.scene_id AS dv_id, core_dataset_field.id AS field_id, core_dataset_field.origin_name, core_dataset_field.name AS field_name, core_dataset_field.type AS raw_field_type, core_dataset_field.field_type AS field_type FROM core_chart_view_snapshot LEFT JOIN core_dataset_field ON core_chart_view_snapshot.table_id = core_dataset_field.dataset_group_id INNER JOIN core_visualization_snapshot dvi ON core_chart_view_snapshot.scene_id = dvi.id WHERE core_chart_view_snapshot.scene_id = #{dvId} AND core_chart_view_snapshot.type != 'VQuery' AND core_chart_view_snapshot.table_id IS NOT NULL AND dvi.id = #{dvId}

SELECT ccv.id AS source_view_id, #{uid} as queryUid, #{isDesktop} as isDesktop, vlj.id, #{dvId} as source_dv_id, vlj.link_jump_info, COALESCE(vlj.checked, 0) AS checked FROM core_chart_view_snapshot ccv LEFT JOIN core_visualization_jump_snapshot vlj ON ccv.id = vlj.source_view_id AND vlj.source_dv_id = #{dvId} WHERE ccv.id = #{viewId}

SELECT vopi.params_info_id as id, vopi.param_name as name, vopi.param_name as title, 'outerParams' as type FROM core_visualization_parameter_item vopi LEFT JOIN core_visualization_parameter vop ON vopi.params_id = vop.params_id WHERE vop.visualization_id = #{dvId}

SELECT vopi.params_info_id as id, vopi.param_name as name, vopi.param_name as title, 'outerParams' as type FROM core_visualization_parameter_item_snapshot vopi LEFT JOIN core_visualization_parameter_snapshot vop ON vopi.params_id = vop.params_id WHERE vop.visualization_id = #{dvId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM core_visualization_jump_target WHERE link_jump_info_id IN ( SELECT lji.id FROM core_visualization_jump_action lji JOIN core_visualization_jump lj ON lji.link_jump_id = lj.id WHERE lj.source_dv_id = #{dvId} )

DELETE FROM core_visualization_jump_target_snapshot WHERE link_jump_info_id IN ( SELECT lji.id FROM core_visualization_jump_action_snapshot lji JOIN core_visualization_jump_snapshot lj ON lji.link_jump_id = lj.id WHERE lj.source_dv_id = #{dvId} )
mapper.insert:
insert into core_visualization_jump (id, source_dv_id, source_view_id, link_jump_info, `checked`, copy_from, copy_id) select
RAWTOHEX(SYS_GUID())
UUID()
as id, visualization_view_copy.t_dv_id as source_dv_id, visualization_view_copy.t_chart_view_id as source_view_id, core_visualization_jump.link_jump_info, core_visualization_jump.checked, core_visualization_jump.id as copy_from, #{copyId} as copy_id from core_visualization_jump inner join (SELECT pvs.scene_id as s_dv_id, pvs.id as s_chart_view_id, pvt.scene_id as t_dv_id, pvt.id as t_chart_view_id FROM core_chart_view pvt inner JOIN core_chart_view pvs ON pvt.copy_from = pvs.id WHERE pvt.copy_id = #{copyId}) visualization_view_copy on core_visualization_jump.source_dv_id = visualization_view_copy.s_dv_id and core_visualization_jump.source_view_id = visualization_view_copy.s_chart_view_id

INSERT INTO core_visualization_jump_action (id, link_jump_id, link_type, jump_type, window_size, target_dv_id, source_field_id, content, `checked`, `attach_params`, copy_from, copy_id) SELECT
RAWTOHEX(SYS_GUID())
uuid()
AS id, plj_copy.t_id, link_type, jump_type, window_size, target_dv_id, source_field_id, content, `checked`, `attach_params`, id AS copy_from, #{copyId} FROM core_visualization_jump_action inner JOIN (SELECT id AS t_id, copy_from AS s_id FROM core_visualization_jump WHERE copy_id = #{copyId}) plj_copy ON core_visualization_jump_action.link_jump_id = plj_copy.s_id

INSERT INTO core_visualization_jump_target (target_id, link_jump_info_id, target_view_id, target_field_id, copy_from, copy_id) SELECT
RAWTOHEX(SYS_GUID())
uuid()
AS id, plji_copy.t_id AS link_jump_info_id, target_view_id, target_field_id, copy_from, #{copyId} AS copy_id FROM core_visualization_jump_target inner JOIN (SELECT id AS t_id, copy_from AS s_id FROM core_visualization_jump_action WHERE copy_id = #{copyId}) plji_copy ON core_visualization_jump_target.link_jump_info_id = plji_copy.s_id
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM core_visualization_jump_action WHERE link_type = 'outer' AND link_jump_id IN (SELECT id FROM core_visualization_jump WHERE source_dv_id = #{dvId})
